description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow that calls a build and package action with a required Anaconda API token secret. Run the action in parallel across multiple environments: Linux x86_64, Linux x86_64 with GPU and CUDA 12.4.0, Linux x86_64 with GPU and cuVS and CUDA 12.4.0, Windows x86_64, OSX arm64, and Linux arm64. For each job, check out the repository with full history and tags, then use the build and package action with the provided token and labels.
